notes: Walk-forward TimeSeriesSplit with label-horizon purging (Lopez de Prado AFML Ch.10). Three tracks evaluated on identical test rows: (1) ml — RF classifier at production RF_PARAMS, signed score = P(BUY)-P(SELL); (2) linear — 7-factor Sicilian composite at production FACTOR_WEIGHTS; (3) ml_regression — SIC-41 Experiment A: RandomForestRegressor trained on cross-sectional rank label = rank_pct_per_date(fwd_ret_20d)*2-1, signed score = predicted rank in [-1,+1]. Cross-sectional IC is Spearman per date averaged across dates (Grinold-Kahn). Unlike trainer.py's CV, this version purges labels that leak into the test fold. aggregate_pooled.{track}.{Nd} additionally carries per_date_dates and per_date_ics — the chronological Spearman-IC series used for regime-conditional analysis, drift detection against live, and higher-moment / Deflated-Sharpe work. Fold entries omit these to keep the JSON compact.
